commands.name: upload-to-tempo

options.name: --cleanup-orphaned
options.description:
Clean up orphaned entries without Clockify IDs (use with 
caution)

options.name: --days
options.description: Number of days to upload time entries for

commands.description: Upload time entries from Clockify to Tempo

commands.name: add-task
commands.description: Add a new task to Clockify from a Jira issue

commands.name: archive-completed-jiras
commands.description:
List tasks that can be archived based on completed Jira 
status

commands.name: week-view
commands.description: Display current week's time entries from Clockify

commands.name: status
commands.description:
Display current in-progress time entry from 
Clockify

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop the currently running time entry in Clockify

commands.name: start
commands.description:
Start a new time entry by selecting from available 
tasks

commands.name: set
commands.description:
Set API keys and credentials (required first 
step)
